title: Funkwhale
description: Free, federated (ActivityPub) music server and sharing platform - a self-hosted alternative to streaming services for the Fediverse.
installation: This template runs the PRIMARY Funkwhale API server container ONLY (funkwhale/api - a Django/gunicorn app listening on HTTP port 5000 via FUNKWHALE_API_IP/FUNKWHALE_API_PORT). Funkwhale is a MULTI-CONTAINER stack and is NOT complete with this pod alone. REQUIRED before first boot: 1) Rotate DJANGO_SECRET_KEY - generate with 'openssl rand -base64 45' (or 'openssl rand -hex 32') and set it; the placeholder MUST be replaced. 2) After the Postgres add-on is up, exec into the api pod and run 'python manage.py migrate' (then 'python manage.py collectstatic --noinput'). 3) Create the first admin with 'python manage.py createsuperuser' (or 'python manage.py fw users create --superuser'). MANDATORY COMPANION SERVICES to deploy as SEPARATE apps (same FUNKWHALE_VERSION, sharing the SAME Postgres + Valkey + media volume): (a) funkwhale/api with command ['celery','-A','funkwhale_api.taskapp','worker','-l','INFO'] - the CELERY WORKER that handles federation delivery, audio import/transcoding, and async tasks (MANDATORY); (b) funkwhale/api with command ['celery','-A','funkwhale_api.taskapp','beat','-l','INFO'] - the CELERY BEAT SCHEDULER for periodic federation/cleanup jobs; (c) funkwhale/front - the NGINX FRONTEND/REVERSE-PROXY image (port 80) that serves the Vue.js SPA, static/media files, and proxies /api to this api pod. Point the funkwhale/front container's FUNKWHALE_API_HOST/FUNKWHALE_API_PORT at this api Service, mount the SAME /srv/funkwhale/data/media (RWX) volume, and route public ingress to funkwhale/front (NOT directly to the api pod). The worker/beat/front pods must share this api pod's media volume - use RWX storage so imported/federated audio is reachable by all. OPTIONAL: a Typesense container (image typesense/typesense) enables full-text search - set TYPESENSE_API_KEY + TYPESENSE_HOST and run 'python manage.py search build'; omit for a basic start. OBJECT STORAGE: for production at scale set AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY / AWS_STORAGE_BUCKET_NAME / AWS_S3_ENDPOINT_URL at an external S3 bucket (e.g. the RustFS add-on) instead of the local media volume. Rotate the Postgres password; Valkey is password-less in-cluster. FUNKWHALE_HOSTNAME is baked into ActivityPub actor URLs and cannot be changed cleanly after federating, so set it to your real host before going live.
